strengths: 20 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Active work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at re:cinq demonstrates current, hands-on engagement with agentic AI tooling
Entrepreneurial track record: founded GISCollective (open-source geo-data platform in production), built and shipped multiple independent projects, and led community workshops and conference talks
concerns: AI expertise is very shallow and recent — one role (April 2025–present) with tooling/infrastructure adjacent to AI, no history of building AI/ML products or platforms at scale
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field; education is a BS in Computer Science and a fine-arts degree, neither aligned with the preferred AI research credentials
Highest career title is 'Staff Software Engineer/Developer' with no evidence of director-level IC scope, strategic customer advisory, or industry-level thought leadership expected for this role
response.justification: The role demands recognized, deep AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, plus director-level scope including advising strategic customers and inspiring industry-wide. Bogdan's resume shows strong full-stack and infrastructure breadth over 20 years, and his current role at re:cinq does include MCP framework and AI-agent tooling work — but this is a single recent position, tooling-adjacent rather than AI-core, with no prior AI product history. The two highest-weight competencies — AI depth and director/advisory seniority — are both absent or undemonstrated. His GISCollective founder experience and community talks show entrepreneurial energy and knowledge-sharing, but at a community rather than strategic-customer-advisory level. Score is derived from meeting tenure requirements and showing relevant momentum, offset heavily by gaps in AI credentials, seniority profile, and advisory track record.
